OptionsResolver Component ========================= The OptionsResolver component is `array_replace` on steroids. It allows you to create an options system with required options, defaults, validation (type, value), normalization and more. Resources --------- * [Documentation](https://symfony.com/doc/current/components/options_resolver.html) * [Contributing](https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/index.html) * [Report issues](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/issues) and [send Pull Requests](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/pulls) in the [main Symfony repository](https://github.com/symfony/symfony)
